zh.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton是Warin de Raleigh II的兒子，於1225年出生在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆。他於大約1263年與Constance De Chelton在英國艾可雷利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1270年在英國戴文享年45歲。

zh-hans.Smallridge, Axminster, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文斯馬爾利其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton是Warin de Raleigh II的儿子，于1225年出生在英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆。他于大约1263年与Constance De Chelton在英国艾可雷利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1270年在英国戴文享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

variants.name: Diamond
meanings: Mainly U.S.: one of the most recent of the girls' names adopted from the vocabulary of gemstones.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton was born in 1225, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England as the son of Warin de Raleigh II. He married Constance De Chelton about 1263, in Rayleigh, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1270, in Devon, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton est né en 1225, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, fils de Warin de Raleigh II. Il a épousé Constance De Chelton environ 1263, à Rayleigh, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1270, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton wurde 1225 in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, als Sohn von Warin de Raleigh II geboren. Er hat um 1263 in Rayleigh, Essex, England Constance De Chelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton è nato il nel 1225 nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, England come figlio di Warin de Raleigh II. Lui sposato Constance De Chelton circa 1263, nel Rayleigh, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1270, nel Devon, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collatonは1225年にイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベでWarin de Raleigh IIの息子として生まれた。約1263年にイギリスエセックスレイレイグでConstance De Cheltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年にイギリスデボンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton(은)는 1225년 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 Warin de Raleigh II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1263년 영국 에세스 라일리에서 Constance De Chelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 영국 데폰에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton nasceu em 1225, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra filho de Warin de Raleigh II. Ele casou-se com Constance De Chelton aproximadamente 1263, em Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1270, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton родился в 1225 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия. Его отца звали Warin de Raleigh II. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance De Chelton около 1263 г. в местности реилиг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1270 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Wimond Raleigh of Collaton nació en 1225, en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra como hijo de Warin de Raleigh II. Se casó con Constance De Chelton aproximadamente 1263, en Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1270, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
